head: 1293e7b
build_profile: cargo pgrx install (debug; opt-level=0, no LTO) — same as the pre-cache 63879a8 sweep, so the warm/cold delta is apples-to-apples.
note: Backend-local Arc<IdMapIndex> cache wired into amgettuple. Cache is per-process (LazyLock<Mutex<HashMap>>). Every fresh backend starts cold; subsequent scans in the same backend hit the cache.

methodology.cold_one_shot: tv_4bit_k100_cold: 50 fresh psql sessions, each runs ONE timed scan. Includes psql connect cost + first amgettuple-path cache miss (SPI fetch + IdMapIndex::load + insert).
methodology.cold_paired: tv_4bit_k100_intracold / _intrawarm (n=16): 16 fresh psql sessions, each runs TWO timed scans on different qids. First = cold (cache miss). Second = warm (cache hit). Pairs cancel backend-startup cost in the cold-vs-warm delta.
methodology.warm_steady: tv_4bit_k100, tv_4bit_k500, tv_2bit_k100: single warm psql session, 2 untimed warmup scans + 50 timed scans. All 50 are cache hits.
methodology.hnsw: hnsw_ef40, hnsw_ef200: same 50-timed pattern in a single warm session (search_path=public so pgvector ops resolve correctly).
